pairs.articleTitle: Anthropic 大代码库 Claude Code 五大扩展点 2026
pairs.pairLogic: Article = Anthropic Applied AI 团队 5 扩展点框架 (CLAUDE.md/hooks/skills/plugins/MCP) + agent manager 角色 + DRI 最小可行版本 + 3-6 个月 harness review 周期 ↔ Project = 425 plugins + 2,810 skills + 200 agents 开源 marketplace 工程化身 + ccpi CLI package manager. 4-way SPM 满中 (Layer 1 cluster practices + Layer 2 5 关键词字面级 + Layer 3 claude-code/anthropic/mcp/plugin-marketplace topics 命中 + Layer 4 抽象↔实现强互补).

sourcesSkipped: https://claude.com/blog/building-multi-agent-systems-when-and-how-to-use-them (cluster overlap with R407 subagents framework, 23K body but cluster saturated)
https://claude.com/blog/cowork-plugins (785 chars body, too shallow for Article - R345 protocol)
https://claude.com/blog/claude-for-enterprise (1966 chars, product launch announcement, no engineering depth)
https://claude.com/blog/building-ai-agents-for-the-enterprise (1781 chars, customer story broad, no specific mechanism)
